title: HelloPure
description: A simple texture pack that follows the vanilla design, and keeps the balanced colors now in 16x16!
body:
![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/eRwHHdg.png)

Introducing HelloPure - Elevate Your Minecraft Experience!

Step into the captivating realm of HelloPure, a texture pack that brings a fresh dimension to Minecraft's visual landscape. Immerse yourself in a world where every block, item, and detail exudes creativity and wonder.

Key Features:

A Harmonious Canvas: HelloPure invites you to explore a universe where harmony and simplicity seamlessly merge with Minecraft's core essence. Embark on an adventure where each pixel has been meticulously designed to capture the spirit of the game.

True to Vanilla Colors: Our texture pack pays homage to the iconic colors of vanilla Minecraft. Every shade resonates with nostalgia, creating a vibrant and harmonious atmosphere that echoes the essence of the game.

Crafted with Precision: HelloPure boasts textures that have been meticulously handcrafted to perfection, showcasing a level of detail that's truly awe-inspiring. We've dedicated ourselves to refining and updating each element, resulting in an extraordinary visual journey.

Enhanced Quality: Watch as textures come to life with depth and shading, breathing new life into every block and item. HelloPure's shading techniques elevate the quality of each texture, adding sophistication to your gameplay.

Thoughtful Playtesting: Prior to reaching your screens, every texture has undergone rigorous playtesting within our own world. We've invested countless hours to ensure your experience is nothing short of immersive beauty.



Embark on an exciting adventure where innovation merges harmoniously with tradition. Whether you're an explorer, a master builder, or a seasoned miner, HelloPure welcomes you to a realm of boundless possibilities.Elevate your Minecraft journey with HelloPure – a texture pack that redefines the familiar and unveils the extraordinary.




SCREENSHOTS

![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/1wmamVB.jpg)
![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/4IaMzRz.png)
![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/ZuUUIDU.png)
![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/n2ZSSkS.png)



<details>
<summary>Installation Instructions</summary>

Download HelloPure.zip
Go to %appdata% (Utilizing Win+R, and typing in %appdata% to reach the directory)
Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks
Load Minecraft and select the "HelloPuire" Resource pack
</details>



If you see this texture pack on any other website, please inform me.
